prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 4SN-BLE-FINEMESHCOLANDERS-2PC-STD-FBA Product Type: FOOD_STRAINER Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille 2pc Fine Mesh Stainless Steel Colander Set, Pasta Strainer, Rice Washer, Fruit & Vegetable Strainer with Handles (11 and 8.75 Inches) Description: Upgrade kitchen, food and meal prep with Beille’s versatile two piece stainless steel mesh colander set, designed for fast, efficient draining and rinsing. Featuring both an 11 inch (five quart) and 8.75 inch (three quart) colander, this set gives you the flexibility to handle everything from large batches of pasta to delicate grains like rice and quinoa. The fine micro mesh design allows water to drain quickly while helping prevent small foods from slipping through, making it ideal as a rice washer, grain strainer, fruit and vegetable washer, and everyday kitchen sieve.

Crafted from durable stainless steel, these colanders are built to withstand daily use, including straining boiling water. The reinforced wire frame and stable base provide added strength and balance, while the built in handles allow for easy lifting, carrying, and over sink use. Whether you’re draining pasta, rinsing produce, or washing grains, this set delivers reliable performance with a clean, modern look that fits seamlessly into any kitchen.

Designed with convenience in mind, the two colanders nest neatly together for compact, space saving storage. This stackable design helps keep your kitchen organized and clutter free, making it easy to store in cabinets, cupboards or drawers without taking up unnecessary space. Perfect for kitchens of all sizes, it’s a practical solution that combines functionality with smart storage.

Designed for everyday convenience, this 2-piece colander set is fully dishwasher safe for quick and easy cleanup after use. The durable stainless steel construction resists staining, warping, and corrosion, allowing both colanders to maintain their performance and appearance wash after wash. Simply place them in the dishwasher and spend less time cleaning, making this set a practical, low-maintenance addition to any kitchen.

From every day meal prep to more demanding kitchen tasks, this stainless steel colander set is a dependable, multipurpose tool built for performance, durability and ease of use. Search Terms: stainless steel colander set micro mesh strainer fine sieve rice washer quinoa strainer vegetable fruit washer pasta strainer over sink strainer stackable colander draining basket kitchen strainer metal colander Features: - VERSATILE 2PC COLANDER SET: Includes 11 and 8.75 inch colanders, three and five quart sizes, for everything from pasta and vegetables, to rice, beans, fruit and more (3 quart and 5 quart approximately) - FINE MICRO MESH STRAINING: Tight mesh design works as a rice washer and grain strainer, allowing fast draining while helping keep small foods contained - DURABLE STAINLESS STEEL: Built for daily use with a reinforced frame that safely handles boiling water, pasta draining, and heavy food loads; two piece colander set is dishwasher safe - FAST DRAIN DESIGN: Mesh body allows water to flow freely from all sides for efficient rinsing, washing and straining of produce and grains - STACKABLE SPACE SAVING STORAGE: Nested design keeps your kitchen organized, while sturdy handles allow easy lifting and convenient over sink use === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Beille 2pc Fine Mesh Stainless Steel Colander Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: 11 And 875 Inch, Fine Micro Mesh, Stackable, Dishwasher Safe, Rice And Pasta Strainer
